scenarios.title: Task tracker base with due-date formula and incomplete-tasks view
scenarios.description: Create a task tracker base with tag filter, formula columns, and a view-level filter for incomplete tasks.

scenarios.title: Fix three bugs in a broken base file
scenarios.description: Diagnose and repair a base that has a Duration.round() error, an undefined formula reference, and an unquoted colon in a displayName.

scenarios.title: Reading list base with cards view and grouped status
scenarios.description: Create a reading list base using cards view, a guarded reading-time formula, and groupBy status.

scenarios.title: Debug global filter blocking an archived-projects view
scenarios.description: Explain why a global tag filter prevents the Archived view from showing archived notes, and fix the base to use view-level filters.

scenarios.title: Daily notes index with day-of-week and word-count formulas
scenarios.description: Create a daily notes index base using folder filter, day-of-week formula, and file.size-based word estimate.
